title: Our University in the USA | University of South Dakota | USA Vlogs Telugu
body:
University name: University of South Dakota
Course: Masters in Computer Science
Course duration: 1.5 years

Fees structure:
Masters in Computer Science without Specialization (Total 30 credits)

Fees for one offline subject(3 credits) = 2323.95$
Fees for one online subject(3 credits) = 1411.35$
Health Insurance = 2000$

1st Semester : 2 offline and 1 online subjects (Total 9 credits)
2 offline(6 credits) = 2 * 2323.95 = 4647.9$
1 online subject(3 credits) = 1 * 1411.35 = 1411.35$
Total 9 Credits = 6,059.25$

2nd Semester: 2 offline and 1 online subjects (Total 9 credits)
2 offline(6 credits) = 2 * 2323.95 = 4647.9$
1 online subject(3 credits) = 1 * 1411.35 = 1411.35$
Total 9 credits = 6,059.25$

Summer Semester: 2 online subjects (Total 6 credits)
2 online subjects(6 credits) = 2 * 1411.35 = 2,822.7$
Total 6 credits = 2,822.7$

3rd Semester: 1 offline and 1 online subject (Total 6 credits)
1 offline(3 credits) = 1 * 2323.95 = 2323.95$
1 online(3 credits) = 1 * 1411.35 = 1411.35$
Total 6 credits = 3,735.3$

Total: 18,676.5$ tuition fees + 2000$ health insurance = 20,676.5$

Masters in Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence Specialization (Total 33 credits)

Fees for one offline subject(3 credits) = 2323.95$
Fees for one online subject(3 credits) = 1411.35$
Health Insurance = 2000$

1st Semester : 2 offline and 1 online subjects (Total 9 credits)
2 offline(6 credits) = 2 * 2323.95 = 4647.9$
1 online subject(3 credits) = 1 * 1411.35 = 1411.35$
Total 9 Credits = 6,059.25$

2nd Semester: 2 offline and 1 online subjects (Total 9 credits)
2 offline(6 credits) = 2 * 2323.95 = 4647.9$
1 online subject(3 credits) = 1 * 1411.35 = 1411.35$
Total 9 credits = 6,059.25$

Summer Semester: 2 online subjects (Total 6 credits)
2 online subjects(6 credits) = 2 * 1411.35 = 2,822.7$
Total 6 credits = 2,822.7$

3rd Semester: 2 offline and 1 online subject (Total 9 credits)
2 offline(6 credits) = 2 * 2323.95 = 4647.9$
1 online subject(3 credits) = 1 * 1411.35 = 1411.35$
Total 9 Credits = 6,059.25$

Total: 21,000.45$ tuition fees + 2000$ health insurance = 23,000.45$
author: @VarunCreations

title: Day in the Life: Commercial Aviation | University of North Dakota
body: Hi. I’m probably going to apply for the university for aviation purposes but don’t actually know if I meet the requirements. I’m from the uk and we use 9-1 to grade ourselves but I’m not exactly sure on how to convert that to American grades and I find it a little bit difficult on the site to find info about this. It’s a shame because I know that this university is extremely good and worth going to. Maybe someone could help me?
